## ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Star First!

**You MUST have starred this repository before submitting a bounty report.**

To star the repository, use the following GitHub API call:

```bash
curl -L \
  -X PUT \
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_TOKEN>" \
  -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" \
  https://api.github.com/user/starred/OWNER/REPO
```

After starring, your report will be eligible for bounty rewards.
